why_this_action.problem: legacy SMTP email logs with subject only inside channel.subject were not deduping against canonical publisher-outreach logs, which falsely inflated recent live external action counts and strengthened hold pressure
why_this_action.risk: the loop could treat a single publisher send as two external actions, keep short-window congestion artificially high, and spend more runs in measurement_hold than the truthful lane state warranted

verification.live_selector_recheck: choose_distribution_lane(2026-05-25T09:24:00) now reports 1 recent live external action instead of 2

replacement_condition: If the selector still idles on measurement_hold after the remaining genuine live-action window is no longer the deciding blocker, escalate into broader blocker-state accounting rather than another packet refresh.
